Package neqsim.process.equipment.lng

Class LNGShipModel.ShipResult

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.equipment.lng.LNGShipModel.ShipResult
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
Enclosing class:
LNGShipModel
public static class LNGShipModel.ShipResult extends Object implements Serializable
Aggregate ship-level result for a single time step.
